title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Puma India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
